functions.name: splitHashlineLines
invariants: result.length >= 1
no element contains LF
terminator-style: trailing terminator adds no phantom line
CR trimmed only when immediately before a terminating LF
split(x).join('\n') === x when x has no trailing terminator

functions.name: parseLid
invariants: accepts exactly one ASCII-whitespace-padded canonical decimal with non-zero first digit
round-trips every positive integer <= Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
rejects leading zeros, signs, radix prefixes, non-ASCII digits

functions.name: detectLineEnding
invariants: LF-less content (incl. lone CR) detects as LF
first-encounter: CRLF wins only when it occurs before the first LF

functions.name: normalizeToLF
invariants: idempotent
result contains no CR byte
byte pair CR LF collapses as ONE ending

functions.name: restoreLineEndings
invariants: identity for ending LF
for CRLF every LF becomes CRLF; pre-existing CR is not protected
restore(normalize(x), detect(x)) === x for single-style documents

functions.name: stripBom
invariants: bom + text === content
strips at most one leading U+FEFF; interior BOMs are content

functions.name: cosineSimilarity
invariants: iterates to the longer length; missing and non-finite entries read as 0
returns 0 when either squared norm is exactly 0 (empty, zero vector, underflow)
norm overflow to Infinity propagates (1e200 pair yields NaN, frozen)
IEEE-exact ops only (+ * / sqrt): ports match bit-for-bit

functions.name: encodeEmbeddingJson
invariants: byte-exact JSON.stringify wire format (persisted embedding_json column)

functions.name: decodeEmbeddingJson
invariants: strict: null for non-string, empty string, malformed/non-array/empty JSON, any non-finite or non-number element
decode(encode(v)) === v for finite non-empty v

functions.name: quantizeInt8AsArray
invariants: clamp to [-1,1], non-finite reads 0, scale by 127 with magnitude-symmetric round-half-up (0.5 -> 64, -0.5 -> -64)

functions.name: binarizeAsArray
invariants: bit set iff entry strictly positive; MSB-first within each byte
dim clamped to min(len, EMBEDDING_DIM); corpus stays <= 32 dims

functions.name: hammingDistanceFromArrays
invariants: popcount of XOR over the shared prefix plus popcount of the longer tail

functions.name: informationScore
invariants: 1 - distance/dim; dim <= 0 returns 0; values past dim go negative (frozen)

functions.name: weibullDecayFactor12
invariants: ageHours <= 0 returns exactly 1
known type: exp(-((age/eta) ** k)) from WEIBULL_PARAMS; unknown type: exp(-age/168)
boundary value rounded to 12 significant digits (libm exp/pow drift)

functions.name: wordSetSorted
invariants: lowercased whitespace-split token set, deduped, UTF-16 code-unit sorted

functions.name: jaccardWordSimilarity
invariants: |A n B| / |A u B| over word sets; 0 when either set is empty (never NaN)

functions.name: mmrRerankRecords
invariants: topK truncated toward 0; <= 0 returns []
stable score-descending presort seeds selection with the top item
greedy argmax of lambda*score - (1-lambda)*maxJaccardToSelected; first winner on ties
unselected remainder fills to topK in sorted order
